Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-42790 affecting package erlang for versions less than 26.2.5.21-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-42790 affecting package erlang for versions less than 26.2.5.21-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.
